popularity: very_high — most common way to connect HubSpot to 3000+ apps without code

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zapier triggers fire too many HubSpot API calls, hitting 110 req/10s limit
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Add delay between Zap steps. Use HubSpot batch endpoints. Reduce polling frequency.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: HubSpot OAuth token expires after 30 minutes. Zapier auto-refreshes but stale connections fail.
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Reconnect HubSpot account in Zapier if connection shows 'expired'. Check that refresh token is still valid.

edge_cases_and_errors.cause: Zapier limits 60 req/min per IP, 150 req/min per partner
edge_cases_and_errors.solution: Wait for cooldown. Free accounts have lower limits — upgrade if needed.
